name: Pumpkin Creme Brulee
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Bring cream to a boil in a heavy saucepan over medium heat.
3. Remove from heat and add vanilla bean; let stand for 20 minutes, then discard.
4. Whisk together yolks, sugar, nutmeg, pumpkin puree, and orange liqueur until smooth.
5. Whisk in the cream mixture.
6. Divide custard among six 1/2-cup ramekins.
7. Arrange ramekins in a heavy large baking pan; add enough hot water to come up halfway up the sides of the ramekins.
8. Bake until sides are set but centers move slightly when shaken, about 20 minutes.
9. Remove from water bath and cool completely in refrigerator for one hour.
10. Preheat broiler.
11. Sift brown sugar and cinnamon into a small bowl; sprinkle over custards.
12. Broil 8 inches from heat source until sugar begins to melt, watching carefully, about 30 seconds.
13. Serve immediately.
